inputs.label: Scale Length
inputs.businessContext: The distance from the nut to the bridge saddle, typically measured in millimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The distance from the nut to the bridge saddle, typically measured in millimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Somundan köprü eşiğine olan mesafe, tipik olarak milimetre cinsinden ölçülür.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Abstand von der Mutter zum Steg, typischerweise in Millimetern gemessen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance de l'écrou au chevalet, généralement mesurée en millimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia desde la tuerca hasta el puente, generalmente medida en milímetros.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Position de la frette à calculer (indexée à partir de 1).
businessContext_i18n.es: Posición del traste a calcular (indexada desde 1).

inputs.label: Total Frets
inputs.businessContext: The total number of frets on the instrument fingerboard.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total number of frets on the instrument fingerboard.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Gesamtzahl der Bünde auf dem Griffbrett des Instruments.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de frettes sur le manche de l'instrument.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de trastes en el diapasón del instrumento.

inputs.label: Compensation
inputs.businessContext: Additional length added to the scale length for intonation compensation at the bridge.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional length added to the scale length for intonation compensation at the bridge.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Köprüde entonasyon dengelemesi için skala uzunluğuna eklenen ek uzunluk.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Länge zur Mensurlänge für die Intonationskompensation am Steg.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur supplémentaire ajoutée à la longueur de diapason pour la compensation d'intonation au chevalet.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud adicional añadida a la escala para compensar la entonación en el puente.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
